title: Fix Platform-Inappropriate Copy
summary: Instructions say 'Click' on mobile. Add a global isTouchDevice check and update How to Play copy dynamically.

tasks.description: Add isTouchDevice utility. Update How to Play modal and shortcuts overlay text dynamically based on platform.
acceptance_criteria: On touch devices, instructions say 'Tap' instead of 'Click'
Shortcuts overlay shows 'Long press' instead of 'Right-click' on mobile

testing_focus: Check copy on both touch and non-touch devices
